text: Machine learning is a type of artificial intelligence where computers learn from data instead of being explicitly programmed. In supervised learning, the computer is given training data, which includes input examples along with the correct answers. The computer uses this data to build a model, which is like a set of rules or patterns that it discovers. Once the model is created, it can make predictions on new, unseen data. For example, after learning from pictures of cats and dogs, it can predict whether a new picture shows a cat or a dog. The success of these predictions is measured by accuracy, which tells us how often the model is correct.
